title: World War I – The Great War
description: Discover the causes, battles, and aftermath of the First World War, which reshaped Europe and the world.

title: World War II – The Deadliest War
description: Learn about the rise of Nazi Germany, the global conflict, and how the world was forever changed by World War II.

title: The American Revolution
description: Explore how thirteen colonies fought for independence from Britain and the birth of a new nation.

title: Iran–Israel Conflict
description: Understand the ongoing tensions, historical background, and current situation between Iran and Israel.
